$comment: Valid: all five required fields plus the optional reasoning_chain.
produced: services/payments/api: refund endpoint wired to worker
decisions: Idempotency key derived from charge id + amount so queue retries cannot double-refund
reasoning_chain: Refunds are retried by the queue on timeout, so the worker had to be idempotent, which required a deterministic idempotency key.
uncertainty: [HIGH] Partial-refund rounding for multi-currency charges - verify against ledger fixtures
[LOW] Metrics counter naming may collide with the legacy dashboard
open_questions: Should refunds older than 90 days route to manual review?
